SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine

Class LateLifeRetrofitStudy

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine.LateLifeRetrofitStudy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class LateLifeRetrofitStudy extends Object implements Serializable
Late-life retrofit study: compares the operating cost and CO2 emissions of a baseline gas turbine fleet against a proposed replacement fleet over a multi-year operating profile, and computes net present value (NPV), cumulative CO2 avoided, and simple payback.

Typical use: a platform currently operates two large aero-derivative turbines (e.g. 40+ MW) that are running far below their design load because production has declined. This study quantifies the savings from replacing them with smaller industrial turbines that match the actual load profile, including CO2 tax escalation.

Inputs are deliberately framed in generic engineering terms — no operator, asset, or vendor names appear in this class.

Version:
$Id: $Id
Author:
neqsim

  • Constructor Details

    • LateLifeRetrofitStudy

      public LateLifeRetrofitStudy(List<GasTurbineUnit> baselineFleet, List<GasTurbineUnit> retrofitFleet, double[] demandProfileMW, int startYear, CO2TaxSchedule co2TaxSchedule, double fuelPriceNOKPerKg)
      Construct a study.
      Parameters:
      baselineFleet - existing turbines (each with spec/ambient/degradation)
      retrofitFleet - replacement turbines
      demandProfileMW - year-by-year average demanded power [MW]
      startYear - calendar year of the first demand entry
      co2TaxSchedule - CO2 cost schedule
      fuelPriceNOKPerKg - fuel price [NOK/kg]

  • Method Details

    • setDiscountRate

      public void setDiscountRate(double discountRate)
      Set the discount rate for NPV.
      Parameters:
      discountRate - fractional discount rate (e.g. 0.08)

    • setRetrofitCapexMNOK

      public void setRetrofitCapexMNOK(double retrofitCapexMNOK)
      Set the retrofit capital expenditure (paid in startYear).
      Parameters:
      retrofitCapexMNOK - CAPEX in million NOK

    • setAnnualOperatingHours

      public void setAnnualOperatingHours(double annualOperatingHours)
      Set the equivalent operating hours per year.
      Parameters:
      annualOperatingHours - operating hours [h/yr]

    • run

      public LateLifeRetrofitStudy.RetrofitResult run()
      Run the study.
      Returns:
      result with year-by-year breakdown and NPV
